name: Color Screw 3D
description: Color Screw 3D: Master the Twist! Welcome to the ultimate 3D puzzle challenge! Dive into a vibrant world of mechanical puzzles designed to test your strategy and precision. Gameplay Mechanics: Your task is to strategically unscrew colorful bolts and sort them into matching color boxes. Be careful—each box has only 3 available slots! Plan your sequence wisely to clear the structure. Feel the tactile satisfaction as object parts fall away with realistic physics once their support is removed, revealing hidden layers and new secrets beneath. Can you turn chaos into perfect order?
instructions: How to Play bull On PC Hold Right Mouse Button and drag to rotate the object Click on a bolt to unscrew it bull On Mobile Swipe to rotate the object 360 deg Tap on a bolt to unscrew it
